sentences.text: The aliens in the movie tried to [abduct] the cow from the farm and take it to their spaceship.
The ending of the book was a bit [ambiguous], so I wasn't sure if the hero actually made it home or not.
My dog will usually walk nicely, but he will [balk] and refuse to move if he sees a puddle in his path.
We used a [compact] camera because it was small enough to fit right in my pocket during our hike.
The soccer coaches had to [confer] at the sideline to decide which player should take the penalty kick.
I decided to [earmark] ten dollars of my birthday money specifically to buy a new video game.
We had to wear heavy coats, scarves, and gloves to stay warm in the [frigid] winter air.
The school is going to [implement] a new rule that gives us five extra minutes of recess on Fridays.
The amount of stars in the giant galaxy is [incalculable] because there are simply too many to count.
With the score being 10 to 0, it was [indisputable] that the Blue Team was the winner of the game.
The doctors gave the patient [intensive] care to make sure they recovered as quickly as possible.
It was difficult to [maneuver] my bike through the crowded sidewalk without bumping into anyone.
The villain tried to [sabotage] the hero’s plan by hiding the secret map before the mission started.
Because there was [scant] evidence that it would rain, we decided to have our picnic outside anyway.
The [stealthy] cat crept through the tall grass without making a single sound.
The [strapping] young man easily lifted the heavy boxes and carried them into the house.
The referee’s [strident] whistle was so loud and sharp that everyone on the field stopped immediately.
Most plants will [thrive] and grow very tall if they get plenty of sunlight and just enough water.
The construction crew used a [titanic] crane to lift the heavy steel beams to the top of the skyscraper.
The [valiant] firefighter rushed into the smoky building to save the family’s tiny kitten.
